title: Jupyter Notebook Comment System
description: Configuration for the collaborative notebook comment and review system

enabled.title: Enable Comment System
enabled.description: Whether to enable the comment and review system for collaborative notebooks

threading.title: Enable Threaded Comments
threading.description: Allow threaded replies to comments for more organized discussions

notifications.title: Notification Level
notifications.description: Configure which comment events trigger notifications

mentionHighlighting.title: Highlight Mentions
mentionHighlighting.description: Highlight text when a user is mentioned in a comment

allowAnonymous.title: Allow Anonymous Comments
allowAnonymous.description: Allow users to post comments without identifying information

displayMode.title: Comment Display Mode
displayMode.description: How comments should be displayed in the notebook

autoHide.title: Auto-hide Comment Indicators
autoHide.description: Automatically hide comment indicators when not in use
